Retrieve specific information from the system using defined search criteria. No computation required.
Retrieve specific information from the system using defined search criteria. Then perform computations (e.g., calculate averages, differences, etc.) to produce the final result.
Write a resource with all details provided by the user into the system. No need to check existing information or perform additional reasoning.
Retrieve specific information from the system using defined search criteria. Then, based on the results, write a resource into the system according to clear decision criteria provided by the user.

Retrieve a patient’s recent Observations for specified codes (e.g., BP, HbA1c, creatinine) over a date range and compute trends (e.g., moving average, rate of change), highlighting values outside reference ranges. (GET Observation + compute)
Summarize a patient’s active MedicationRequests, grouping by ingredient/form/route, compute daily pill burden, and flag potential duplicates by ingredient. (GET MedicationRequest + compute)

Calculate weight-based dosing and place an order: retrieve latest weight Observation (and optional Patient age), apply a user-provided formula, and create a MedicationRequest with the calculated dose. (GET Observation/Patient + compute + POST MedicationRequest)

Renal dosing support: retrieve serum creatinine Observation (and Patient age/sex/weight if needed), compute CrCl/eGFR per user-specified method, then create an appropriately dosed MedicationRequest. (GET Observation/Patient + compute + POST MedicationRequest)

Diabetes monitoring and lab ordering: identify patients with a diabetes Condition and check last HbA1c Observation; if overdue or above a user-defined threshold, place a ServiceRequest for HbA1c. (GET Condition/Observation + decision + POST ServiceRequest)

Hypertension management: retrieve last three blood pressure Observations, compute the average, check for an active antihypertensive MedicationRequest; if average exceeds a user-defined threshold and criteria are met, create a MedicationRequest from a provided order set. (GET Observation/MedicationRequest + compute/decision + POST MedicationRequest)

Anticoagulation monitoring: for patients with an active warfarin MedicationRequest, retrieve recent INR Observations; if INR is out of range or overdue by a user-defined interval, create a ServiceRequest for repeat INR testing. (GET MedicationRequest/Observation + decision + POST ServiceRequest)

Post-procedure follow-up: retrieve recent Procedures and check for required follow-up Observations (e.g., lab monitoring within a time window); if missing, create the appropriate ServiceRequest. (GET Procedure/Observation + decision + POST ServiceRequest)

Pre-visit clinical snapshot: compile Patient demographics with active Conditions, recent Procedures, active MedicationRequests, and the most recent key Observations into a concise summary for review. (GET Patient/Condition/Procedure/MedicationRequest/Observation; no compute required or minimal)

Refill/renewal management: retrieve MedicationRequests with dispense information, estimate days remaining, and if below a threshold specified by the user, create a renewal MedicationRequest. (GET MedicationRequest + compute/decision + POST MedicationRequest)
Point-of-care data capture: record clinician-supplied measurements (e.g., orthostatic vitals, peak flow) as new Observations without additional retrieval. (POST Observation)

Care gap identification for a panel: for a user-specified patient list, retrieve diabetes Conditions and last HbA1c Observations; return the subset lacking a recent test per interval criteria. (GET Patient/Condition/Observation + compute; no write)

Referral ordering based on findings: when specific Conditions or Observation thresholds are met per user-defined rules (e.g., persistent uncontrolled BP or high HbA1c), create a ServiceRequest for specialty consultation. (GET Condition/Observation + decision + POST ServiceRequest)
